description: §21.2 Form 1 — an `export <Card>` with a single markup root (`<div>`) is a well-formed Form-1 component; E-EXPORT-002 stays silent.
rationale:
§21.2 Form 1: a single-rooted body is the required shape. `export
a
` desugars to `export const Card =
a
`, so E-EXPORT-002 must not fire — the clean twin of the multi-root case.
